text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking by the station on one of my days off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm, this is where I'm supposed to meet Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Are you... Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Uh, yeah. I am...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! It's really you!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I drew a picture of you and sent it to
you with a letter a while back!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you the one who drew the picture of me
at my concert?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yep! So you read my letter?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, the drawing was so cute. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I'll send you another one! Oh, I've gotta go! Keep
up the great work in your races! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Mhm, bye-bye.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! Ain't you cute, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Taiki?! You surprised me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, I'm the one who's surprised!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I've never seen ya lookin' so happy before!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: R-really? Do I really look that happy?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh, I guess my heart does feel kind of warm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Of course you do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Fan letters sure do spark up your spirit! I know
they always sharpen my focus and boost my
mood!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So this is what it's like to have fans... It's nice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You bet your tail! Oh, I just thought of somethin'
real good!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
How about we go do some trainin' so you can
keep up that happy face for the rest of your
days?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, I think I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being rejected, Taiki Shuttle follows
Silence Suzuka around for the rest of the day,
trying to make her smile again.
